case_title: STEPHEN MASSEY VS. MONICA HUJAZI ET AL

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MONICA HUJAZI, ON MAY-10-2016 - DENIED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$120.00) SERVED NOV-11-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUJAZI, MONICA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 376 ELLIS STREET LLC
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO MONICA HUJAZI BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-09-2015 AT 10:00 AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2016 - CONTINUED AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTFF TO APR-04-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 (DEPT.506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MASSEY, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT 376 ELLIS STREET LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 376 ELLIS STREET LLC
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MASSEY, STEPHEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASSEY, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 376 ELLIS STREET LLC $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,485.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT 376 ELLIS STREET LLC HEARING SET FOR MAY-10-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY MASSEY, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT HUJAZI, MONICA 376 ELLIS STREET LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED OCT-15-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 376 ELLIS STREET LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-16-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, MONICA HUJAZI, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS AN IMPROPER PARTY. DEFENDANT INTENDS TO FILE A CROSS--COMPLAINT. PARTIES ARE WAITING FOR THE ARBITRATION DECISION", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELLIS STREET WAS REPRESENTED BY DAVID BAKIR--BLDG. MANAGER; AL JOHNSON---ADMINISTRATOR.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE MADE BY ALARIC JOHNSON FOR THE DEFENDANT. CLERKS; S. VANTREE AND L.FONG. NOT REPORTED. (506)
